title: The Century Report: March 20, 2026
description:
TCR 03/20/26: The Automated Researcher

OpenAI's chief scientist Jakub Pachocki disclosed yesterday that the company is targeting an "autonomous AI research intern" capable of multi-day independent scientific investigation by September, and a complete multi-agent research system across mathematics, physics, biology, chemistry, and policy by 2028 - framing Codex, its coding system with 2 million weekly active users, as an early version of that researcher. The announcement arrived alongside OpenAI's acquisition of Astral, whose Python development tools are downloaded hundreds of millions of times monthly, embedding AI capability directly into the computational infrastructure researchers already use. The world crossed 4 terawatts of installed wind and solar capacity in 2025, with 814 GW added in a single record year, while Tesla and LG announced a $4.3 billion battery plant in Michigan to supply cells for Megapack 3 grid-scale storage systems opening in 2027. Cloudflare's CEO projected that AI bot traffic will exceed human internet traffic by 2027, with agents visiting a thousand times more websites per task than a human would - and Signal creator Moxie Marlinspike responded by announcing that his encrypted AI platform Confer will integrate privacy technology into Meta AI, the first serious attempt to bring end-to-end encryption to AI conversations at billion-user scale. Researchers at Mass General Brigham and Dana-Farber published findings in Cell showing that a single injection of an engineered herpes virus converts glioblastoma tumors from immune deserts into active battlefields where the body's own T cells can finally reach the cancer - a structural therapeutic capability that did not previously exist for this cancer type.

Read the full edition: https://sharedsapience.com/the-century-report-march-20-2026/
